subcodes.first_line: Truth, glorified be His glory, hath created the peoples of the world for His knowledge, and hath adorned them all with the ornament of wisdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حق جل جلاله اهل عالم را مخصوص معرفت خود خلق فرموده و جمیع را بطراز دانائی
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @universal human capacity for spiritual recognition
